interface.name: weston_screenshooter

description.summary: capture a compositor output to a shared-memory buffer

interface.description: Bound once from the registry; callers issue shoot() for each capture.

request.name: shoot
request.description:
Instruct the compositor to copy the current contents of output into buffer. The buffer must be a wl_shm buffer whose size exactly matches the output's current mode (width × height × 4 bytes, WL_SHM_FORMAT_XRGB8888).
The compositor responds asynchronously with the done event.

event.name: done
event.description: Sent by the compositor once the capture attempt has completed. The outcome field conveys success or the reason for failure.

entry.name: success
entry.summary: capture succeeded; buffer now contains the screenshot

entry.name: no_memory
entry.summary: compositor ran out of memory during capture

entry.name: bad_buffer
entry.summary: buffer dimensions or format do not match the output
